segments.text:
Hear this, house of Jacob, you who are called by the name of Israel, 
and have come out of the waters of Judah. You swear by Yahweh’s name, and make mention of the God of Israel, 
but not in truth, nor in righteousness—
segments.speaker: God

segments.text:
for they call themselves citizens of the holy city, and rely on the God of Israel; 
Yahweh of Armies is his name.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
I have declared the former things from of old. Yes, they went out of my mouth, and I revealed them. 
I did them suddenly, and they happened.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text:
Because I knew that you are obstinate, and your neck is an iron sinew, 
and your brow bronze;
segments.speaker: God
God

segments.text:
You have heard it. Now see all this. 
And you, won’t you declare it?
“I have shown you new things from this time, even hidden things, which you have not known.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text:
They are created now, and not from of old. Before today, you didn’t hear them, 
lest you should say, ‘Behold, I knew them.’
segments.speaker: God

segments.text:
Yes, you didn’t hear. Yes, you didn’t know. 
Yes, from of old your ear was not opened, for I knew that you dealt very treacherously, and were called a transgressor from the womb.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text:
For my name’s sake, I will defer my anger, and for my praise, I hold it back for you
so that I don’t cut you off.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text:
Behold, I have refined you, but not as silver. 
I have chosen you in the furnace of affliction.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For my own sake, for my own sake, I will do it; for how would my name be profaned? I will not give my glory to another.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text:
“Listen to me, O Jacob, and Israel my called: I am he. I am the first. 
I am also the last.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text:
Yes, my hand has laid the foundation of the earth, and my right hand has spread out the heavens. 
when I call to them, they st and up together.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: “Assemble yourselves, all of you, and hear! Who among them has declared these things? He whom Yahweh loves will do what he likes to Babylon, and his arm will be against the Chaldeans.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I, even I, have spoken. Yes, I have called him. I have brought him and he shall make his way prosperous.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text:
“Come near to me and hear this:
“From the beginning I have not spoken in secret; from the time that it happened, I was there.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Now the Lord Yahweh has sent mewith his Spirit.
Yahweh, your Redeemer,
the Holy One of Israel, says:

I am Yahweh your God, who teaches you to profit, 
who leads you by the way that you should go.
segments.speaker: the Holy One of Israel

segments.text:
Oh that you had listened to my commandments! Then your peace would have been like a river
and your righteousness like the waves of the sea.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text:
Your offspring also would have been as the sand and the descendants of your body like its grains. 
His name would not be cut off nor destroyed from before me.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Leave Babylon! Flee from the Chaldeans! With the sound of joyful shouting announce this, tell it even to the end of the earth;
say,
Yahweh has redeemed his servant Jacob!
segments.speaker: the Holy One of Israel

segments.text: They didn’t thirst when he led them through the deserts. He caused the waters to flow out of the rock for them.
He also split the rock and the waters gushed out.
There is no peace
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: says Yahweh,
for the wicked.
segments.speaker: Yahweh
